description: You are an insurance claims investigator reviewing dashcam footage (/home/ga/Videos/dashcam_footage.mp4, 3 minutes) of a multi-vehicle collision. Identify the exact timestamps for the 5 events referenced in the incident log (/home/ga/Documents/incident_log.txt). For each event, capture a forensic-quality snapshot and a 5-second video clip centered on the event to /home/ga/Videos/evidence_clips/. Save a corrected timeline with accurate timestamps and event descriptions to /home/ga/Documents/corrected_timeline.json.
